chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A. No.S-608 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No. 5541/2023 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No.5542/2023 4. For hearing of main case 12.06.2023 Miss Tahrim Jawahri advocate for applicant along with applicant -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. It is stated that applicant is innocent but has been falsely implicated in this case out of enmity; that the applicant wants to surrender before the trial court but needs protection as he apprehends his arrest. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for 08 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- and PR Bond of the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 08 days on 19.06.2023 or on surrender of the applicant before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. In case, the applicants fails to appear before the court concerned within the stipulated period, the surety furnished on behalf of applicant shall stand forfeited. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
